value.body:
## Summary

Upgrade `lucide-react` from 1.17.0 to 1.21.0 in the packages that declare it.

## Affected manifests

- `packages/desktop/package.json`
- `packages/ui/package.json`

## Rationale

`pnpm outdated --recursive --format json` reports a newer minor release. This should be low risk, but icon packages can occasionally rename or adjust exports, so build verification is enough unless visual changes are obvious.

## Verification

- Run `pnpm --filter @cycle/desktop build`.
- Run `pnpm --filter @cycle/ui storybook:build`.
- Smoke test the desktop shell for missing icons.
value.title: Upgrade lucide-react to 1.21.0
